name: SNISID: Lateral Movement to Database via Compromised VPN
description: Detects a sequence where a user fails VPN/IAM authentication multiple times, subsequently succeeds, and immediately executes sensitive DML/DDL against the Database.
query:
sequence by user.name with maxspan=15m
  [ authentication where event.outcome == "failure" and event.module == "keycloak" ]
  [ authentication where event.outcome == "success" and event.module == "keycloak" ]
  [ event where event.category == "database" and event.action in ("DROP", "ALTER", "DELETE", "TRUNCATE") ]

params.message: Critical Lateral Movement Detected for user {{user.name}}.
